top_signals.title: Japan enacts bill to drastically raise visa-related fees
top_signals.summary: Under the bill, the statutory upper limit for fees to change residency statuses or extend a period of stay will go from ¥10,000 to ¥100,000.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
